name: Daniel Workman
title: Full Stack Engineer
summary: Full stack software engineer with 5+ years of experience who codes for work and for fun. I learnt the fundamentals before AI tools took off, so I know when to trust them and when to write it myself. In my current role I've developed a structured Claude Code workflow: detailed markdown specs, CLI execution, custom QA, and manual review. It's the kind of process thinking I bring to everything I build.

experience.description: Delivering performant, extensible, and secure features for the web application and API serving 4,500+ churches. Trusted to make independent technical and architectural decisions on features I owned, from scoping through to deployment.

projects.title: Google Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Built a new insights dashboard giving customers at-a-glance access to key metrics via horizontal bar, line, and pie charts. Designed a flexible React hook accepting arbitrary combinations of dimensions, metrics, and dimension filters.

projects.title: Bulk Actions
projects.description: Designed and shipped a reusable bulk-selection system (Asana-style cmd+click multi-select) significantly reducing time-on-task for editors. Built a configurable React hook and a selection-aware card component.

projects.title: User Activity Log
projects.description: Shipped a transparency feature letting account owners audit actions taken by admins. Placed the component inside an accordion to defer data fetching. Built a new API route and service querying Revisions via Sequelize.

projects.title: iMessage Link Preview Fix
projects.description: Diagnosed and fixed a cross-system bug where thumbnails failed to render in iMessage due to missing MIME types on S3. Set up Cloudflare Tunnel for debugging and implemented a fix for correct MIME types.

experience.description: Built websites and web applications for enterprise and government clients using Squiz's proprietary CMS (Matrix) and developer tooling.

projects.title: React App Performance Optimisation
projects.description: Reduced load times from 17+ seconds to under 2 seconds. Diagnosed root causes, migrated data access, and fixed JWT authentication handling.

projects.title: Legacy Search Rebuild
projects.description: Rebuilt an enterprise search page into a modular TypeScript React application. Designed a process to generate a structured XML feed indexed by Funnelback.

experience.description: Engineered bespoke client websites in a fast-paced agency, using JavaScript and PHP to build custom front-end interactions and back-end functionality aligned to design requirements.
Delivered digital marketing campaigns and managed end-to-end web production for SME clients across diverse industries in a fast-paced branding agency.
